title: SOW Modded Addon
description:
Add on to my Songs of War villager ressource pack for modded
(Guard Villagers, Straw Statues)
body:
<font color="#f02222">**Not updated to match 3.0.0**</font>

![Header](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f1eb5a3c8f3fa5e30c49d69f884c1b508a0b06bf.png)


### This is an addon for modded to be used along side [Songs of War Villagers](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/songs-of-war-villagers)

Supported mods:

  - Guard Villagers (Both [Fabric](https://modrinth.com/mod/guard-villagers-(fabricquilt)) and [Forge](https://modrinth.com/mod/guard-villagers))

```   
      You must use the regular guard model, not the steve one
      You can get any skin by renaming. List of possible names in the .pdf inside the pack
      But only a few solider skined will naturally spawn depending of the biome
          Plains will have Ardoni skins (also in other biomes not in the following list)
          Deserts will have Karthen & Northwind skins
          Savanna will have Hydraphel & General skins
          Swamps will have Conchord skins
          Jungle will have Cydonia & Etherea skins
          Taiga will have Felden skins
          Snow plains will have Crown Peak skins      
```

      
  - [Straw Statues](https://modrinth.com/mod/straw-statues)

```   
      Rename a straw statue in the style tab will give it the texture
```

##
### This pack require at least [Entity Texture Features 6.1](https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures), [Entity Model Features 2.1](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features) & [Entity Sound Features](https://modrinth.com/mod/esf)

[Chime](https://modrinth.com/mod/chime) or [CIT Resewn](https://modrinth.com/mod/cit-resewn) & [Omega Mute](https://modrinth.com/mod/omega-mute) are optional but recommanded for the immersion

It uses some ETF/EMF exclusive features and therefore is not compatible with optifine!
